underlying_goal: Add real-time UI updates for schema definitions, then brainstorm and plan a remote agent dispatch system for tracking Claude Code agent builds, culminating in detailed Trello cards for implementation

brief_summary: User wanted real-time schema UI updates implemented, then collaboratively designed a remote agent dispatch system and had detailed Trello cards created for it — all achieved successfully.
